data.content: Implemented immediate Setlist invalidation on authoritative beat-state observation. Added a beat_state_observed terminal event, emit it after post-exit state fetch in the take loop, and invalidate active ['beats'], ['setlist-plan'], and ['setlist-plan-beat'] queries from the session connection manager. Validation passed in worktree /Users/cartine/foolery/.worktrees/foolery-9e12: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
